title: Skills prose sweep: all SKILL.md + references teach bee.mjs form
action: Per D4: across every skills/*/SKILL.md and skills/*/references/*.md (EXCLUDING skills/bee-hive/templates/ — handled elsewhere — and EXCLUDING every skills/*/CREATION-LOG.md: those are historical TDD build logs, records like docs/history, never swept), replace each bee_*.mjs invocation with the `node .bee/bin/bee.mjs <group> <verb>` equivalent, preserving verbs, flags, and surrounding sentence meaning. Heaviest files: bee-swarming (SKILL + swarming-reference ~24), bee-reviewing (SKILL + reference ~21), bee-executing worker-details ~11, bee-scribing SKILL ~9, bee-compounding SKILL ~10, bee-hive routing-and-contracts ~9. This is a semantic sweep, not blind sed: each rewritten line must still read correctly and the mapped group/verb must exist in the bee.mjs registry (check with node .bee/bin/bee.mjs --help --json when unsure).

truths: zero bee_*.mjs references remain under skills/ outside skills/bee-hive/templates/ and outside CREATION-LOG.md files
every rewritten command names a real bee.mjs group+verb
prohibitions: no changes under skills/bee-hive/templates/ in this cell
no meaning drift in rewritten sentences

trace.outcome: Skills prose sweep: rewrote every bee_*.mjs invocation to node .bee/bin/bee.mjs <group> <verb> across 22 skills/*/SKILL.md + skills/*/references/*.md files (139 mechanical rewrites via group-preserving regex, plus 2 hand-rewritten prose spots that referenced the shims as standalone entities: bee-compounding/SKILL.md's feedback-digest warn-never-block paragraph, and bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md's Helper CLI Quick Reference paragraph which used to claim the shims 'remain valid' — now correctly states they are retired per D1/decision bbc6bcea). templates/ and CREATION-LOG.md untouched.
trace.verify_output: empty grep result, no matching files found -> VERIFY_PASSED
